macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Global Stock Markets Open Lower on Monday March 9
items.summary: Major indices showed declines at open: US S&P 500 down 0.60% at 6,699.80, Dow down 0.27% at 47,371.28, Nasdaq down 0.91% at 22,184.05; Europe's DAX plunged 2.51% to 22,998.94 while FTSE flat; Asia's Nikkei dropped 5.20% to 52,728.72, Hang Seng down 1.35%.

items.title: US Stock Futures Point to Sharp Declines Ahead of Open
items.summary: With 50 minutes to open, futures signal Dow -1.25%, Nasdaq -1.19%, S&P 500 -1.10% lower, amid broader market concerns.

items.title: Bank of America Issues Shock Stock Market Message
items.summary: Bank of America dropped a surprising update on the stock market, highlighted in pre-market coverage.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.4, Reclaims Top Spot on Benchmarks
items.summary: OpenAI rolled out GPT-5.4, which has reclaimed the top position on Artificial Analysis benchmarks while introducing new cost-efficiency tradeoffs for practitioners. The update highlights ongoing advancements in high-efficiency inference models.

items.title: Axiomatic AI Raises $18M for Verified Science and Engineering Infrastructure
items.summary: Axiomatic AI secured $18 million in funding to develop intelligence infrastructure focused on verified science and engineering applications. The investment supports building robust AI systems for critical technical domains.

items.title: New Technique Makes Deep AI Training More Stable by Predicting Errors
items.summary: Researchers developed a method for deep AI training that enhances stability by enabling models to predict their own errors. This breakthrough addresses a key limitation in AI reliability compared to human performance.

items.title: AI in Military Training Market Projected to Reach $1.57B in 2026
items.summary: The AI in military training market is expected to grow from $1.46 billion in 2025 to $1.57 billion in 2026 at a CAGR of 8.0%, driven by demand for simulation engines, adaptive learning, and defense investments. Key technologies include machine learning, NLP, and computer vision.
items.source: EIN Presswire / The Business Research Company

items.title: Shenzhen Releases 'Lobster 10' Policy to Boost AI Lobster Farming Ecosystem
items.summary: Shenzhen introduced the 'Lobster 10' policy with incentives like free deployment and million-yuan subsidies to support the booming AI 'lobster farming' ecosystem. Hardware demand has led to sell-outs of Mac minis for local AI model hosting.

items.title: HIMSS26 Highlights Convergence of AI Governance and Cybersecurity
items.summary: At the 2026 HIMSS Global Health Conference, a key focus is the integration of AI governance with cybersecurity resilience in healthcare. The event underscores emerging trends in secure AI deployment.

items.title: NASA AI/ML STIG Lecture on Equivariant Neural Networks
items.summary: NASA's AI/ML Science and Technology Interest Group hosts a lecture on March 9, 2026, featuring Anna Scaife from the University of Manchester discussing applications of equivariant neural networks.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection Receives Rave Review
items.summary: Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection earns high praise for its compelling narrative, explosive combat animations, and innovative monster-taming mechanics in a turn-based RPG format. The review highlights its thrilling story, exceptional gameplay loop, and status as a standout in the Monster Hunter series.

items.title: Xbox Game Pass Adds 14 Title Updates on March 9
items.summary: Xbox Game Pass introduced 14 title updates this week, providing fresh content for subscribers as rounded up on March 9, 2026.

items.title: Five New Steam Games Launch This Week Including Shinehill and Angel Engine
items.summary: Recent Steam releases highlighted include Shinehill in Early Access (March 7), Angel Engine horror surgery simulator (March 7), and others like Planet of Lana II (March 6) and iRacing Arcade (March 4). These indie titles span genres from adventure to horror.

items.title: Video Game News Discussion Roundup for March 9
items.summary: BlueGamer's latest video covers key video game news and discussions specifically for March 9, 2026, inviting community input via Discord.

items.title: VGU.TV Discusses Biggest Gaming News in 2025 GOTY Awards
items.summary: VGU.TV's GOTY 2025 podcast episode on March 9 covers the biggest gaming news of the year alongside categories like Best Look and Zeitgeist.
